# Research Notebooks

This site contains rendered research notebooks.

## Studies

- [BTC/QQQ Residual Z-Score UPRO Backtest](examples/btc-qqq-residual-upro-backtest.html)
- [End-of-Month SPY/TLT Rebalance Flow](examples/spy-tlt-eom-rebalance-flow.html)
- [Short-Term SPY/TLT Relative Reversal](examples/spy-tlt-short-term-reversal.html)
- [TLT Turn-of-Month Effect](examples/tlt-turn-of-month-effect.html)
- [Vol-Targeted Optimized Portfolio of SPY/TLT Signals](examples/spy-tlt-signal-portfolio-vol-target.html)
